history.title: 'The King's Speech' wins top Oscars
history.description: "Susan King and Rene Lynch Los Angeles Times Staff Writers""The King's Speech"" was crowned best film at the 83rd Academy Awards on Sunday night. Nominated for 12 Oscars -- the most of any film -- it won four statuettes, including for Colin Firth for lead actor, Tom Hooper for director, and David Se
